positive: A central, vibrant circular graphic featuring stylized celestial elements: a crescent moon cradling a glowing stylized comet, surrounded by abstract swirls of nebula dust and blooming cosmic florals. The overall aesthetic should be Art Nouveau meets modern geometric minimalism. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, shimmering gold, cosmic lavender, and stark white. The composition must be perfect for a central apparel print, maintaining clean lines, strong silhouettes, and crisp detail suitable for screen printing. Focus on symmetry and balance.
negative: blur, sketch, watermark, signature, text, low resolution, artifacts, noise, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad hands, messy, dirty, grain
